urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N SAMBHAL KAR QADAM UTHANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Take extra care when you take a step here

urdu transliteration text:
YEH KARBALA HAI, YEH KARBALA HAI..
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: For this is Karbala, this is Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
YEH BAAT HARGIZ NA BHUL JAANA
Never forget this message…
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

JAHAN E SABR O REZA YEHI HAI, KHUDA E SABR O REZA YAHEEN HAI
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The epitome of patience and submission is right here

urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N PE AATE HAI CHALKE MEHDI, BEHISHT E ZAHRA YE SAR ZAMEE'N HAI
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Imam Mahdi (A.S.) walks to this land; this land is Zahra’s (A.S.) paradise

urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N HAI ZAHRA KA AANA JANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Zahra (A.S.) keeps visiting this land frequently…

urdu transliteration text:
DUAEIN DENGE HUSSAIN TUMKO, YAHA'N PE AANSU AGAR BAHAYE
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Imam Hussain (A.S.) will pray for you himself, should you shed tears on this land…

urdu transliteration text:
JAHA'N PE BETI NE BEWATAN KI, SITAMGARO SE TAMACHE KHAYE
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Where the daughter of a homeless person was slapped by treacherous people

urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N PE KHUSHIYO KO BHUL JAANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Forget your happiness here…

urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N PE GUZRI HAI WO QAYAMAT, MILA NA USKO SUKOON AB TAK
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: On this land, the earth was shattered, such that he has still not found peace…

urdu transliteration text:
RIDAEIN CHINNE KE GHUM MEIN ABID, LAHAD MEIN ROTA HAI KHOON AB TAK
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: For the sorrow of the ladies losing their veils, Aabid still cries with tears of blood from his grave

urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N PE HARGIZ NA MUSKURANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Do not smile at this place…

urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N PE HURR BHI THA HURMALA BHI, KITABE HASTI KO PADHKE DEKHO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: On this land there was Hurr, as well as Hurmala, if only you read the book of personalities

urdu transliteration text:
SADA E HALMIN JO AA RAHI HAI, TUM IS TARAF HO YA US TARAF HO
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The call of Halmin is still being heard, are you on the side of good or evil?

urdu transliteration text:
TUMHE AMAL SE HAI AB BATANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You can answer this call only by your actions…

urdu transliteration text:
KAHI'N PE QASIM HUE HAI TUKDE, KAHI'N PE ZEE'N SE GIRE THE MAULA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Somewhere on this land Qasim was cut into pieces, somewhere Maula (Hussain A.S.) fell from his horse

urdu transliteration text:
KAHI'N SAKINA SUMO SE LIPTI, KAHI'N PE ASGHAR NE TEER KHAYA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Somewhere on this land Sakina held on to the hooves (of Zuljanah), somewhere Asghar was shot by an arrow

urdu transliteration text:
YAHI’N GHAREEBI KA HAI THIKANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: This is a land of misfortunes

urdu transliteration text:
SAWARI AAYEGI EK WAHA'N SE, NAJAF KI JANIB NIGAAH RAKHNA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: There is a horse rider coming, if you look towards Najaf

urdu transliteration text:
JAB AAYE SHAME GHARIBA'N JIS DUM, ALI KO ZAINAB KA PURSA DENA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The moment Shaam-e-gharibaan dawns upon us, give Zainab’s condolences to her father Ali (A.S)

urdu transliteration text:
TUM AANSUO KE DIYE JALANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Prepare lanterns with your tears…

urdu transliteration text:
KISI KE DIL MEIN LAGI HAI BARCHI, KISI KE BAAZU KATE YEHI PAR
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Someones heart was pierced with a spear; someones arms were chopped here

urdu transliteration text:
HAYE ALI KI BETI KE KITNE YUSUF,  LAHU MEIN DOOBE HAI IS ZAMEE'N PAR
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Alas! How many Yusuf’s of Zainab, have been drenched in blood on this land?

urdu transliteration text:
LUTA HAI SADAAT KA GHARANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The household of the Imam has been ransacked

urdu transliteration text:
RAHE KAHI'N BHI JAHA'N MEIN JAKAR, HUSSAIN WALE YE JAANTE HAI
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Where ever we live on this planet, the lovers of Hussain (A.S) know..

urdu transliteration text:
HUM EHLE MATAM KE DIL TAKALLUM,YAHA'N KI MITTI SE HI BANE HAI
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We are the people who do Maatam and our hearts are made with the dust of this land (Karbala)

urdu transliteration text:
YAHA'N HAI WAPAS PALATKE AANA
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We will eventually come back to this land…
